en_title: Planet Zoo 2 All But Confirmed Following YouTube Page Update
cn_title: 《Planet Zoo 2》几乎坐实：YouTube频道悄然更新「2」

paragraphs.en: Frontier Developments may not have formally announced a sequel to its delightful zoo sim, Planet Zoo, but that hasn't stopped someone trimming up the game's YouTube channel with some not-so-subtle hints that Planet Zoo 2 is on the way.
paragraphs.cn: Frontier Developments或许还没有正式宣布旗下令人愉悦的动物园模拟游戏《Planet Zoo》要出续作，但这并未阻止有人去给这款游戏的YouTube频道动手脚——以并不那么含蓄的方式暗示《Planet Zoo 2》正在路上。

paragraphs.en: As spotted by our friends over at Eurogamer, if you head over to the series' official YouTube page, you'll find both the head and the avatar image has been updated with a '2' on the end.
paragraphs.cn: 根据外媒Eurogamer的发现，如果你打开该系列的官方YouTube页面，会看到主图和头像都已被更新——结尾多了一个「2」。

paragraphs.en: This isn't a clue as much as full confirmation, even though there's been no firm announcement... yet.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管目前还没有正式的官宣……但这与其说是线索，不如说已经几乎是板上钉钉。

paragraphs.en: It's not entirely a surprise, of course; Frontier did tease that a follow-up game was in the works when it released a trailer celebrating the sim's sixth anniversary at the end of last year. However, it's our closest clue yet that a game isn't just in development, but could shortly be out… maybe we'll find out more as we move into Summer Games Fest?
paragraphs.cn: 当然，这其实不算太意外——去年年底Frontier在发布纪念《Planet Zoo》六周年的宣传片时就已暗示，续作正在开发中。不过这是迄今为止最接近实锤的信息：游戏不仅在开发中，而且可能不久后就会面世……也许我们能在即将到来的Summer Game Fest上获得更多消息？

paragraphs.en: We thought Planet Zoo was a "wildly satisfying park-builder with a menagerie of lovely looking animals."
paragraphs.cn: 我们当年曾评价《Planet Zoo》是「一款带着众多可爱动物的、令人极为满足的园区建造游戏」。
